zh.of, Poltimore, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文波爾莫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Bampfylde於1485年出生在英國戴文波爾莫時，他的父親William Bamfield26歲，母親Margaret St Maur16歲。他於1515年與Elizabeth Wadham在英國英格蘭戴文波爾莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1528年5月20日在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國戴文波爾莫。

zh-hans.of, Poltimore, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文波爾莫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Bampfylde于1485年出生在英国戴文波爾莫时，他的父亲William Bamfield26岁，母亲Margaret St Maur16岁。他于1515年与Elizabeth Wadham在英国英格兰戴文波爾莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1528年5月20日在他的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在英国戴文波爾莫。

nameMeanings.name: Bampfylde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Banfield
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, Normandy, France. There has been some confusion between this surname and   Bonfield  . In Ireland this is a variant of   Banville  , the original French form of the placename, and now the usual spelling of the surname in Ireland; it is associated primarily with County Wexford.

English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in England with similar names, such as Bampfylde House in Poltimore, Devon and Bamville Farm in Wheathampstead, Hertfordshire. There may have been some confusion with   Benfield  .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Bampfylde was born in 1485, in Poltimore, Devon, England, his father, William Bamfield, was 26 and his mother, Margaret St Maur, was 16. He married Elizabeth Wadham in 1515, in Poltimore, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died on 20 May 1528, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Poltimore, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Bampfylde est né en 1485, à Poltimore, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Bamfield, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret St Maur, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wadham en 1515, à Poltimore, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 20 mai 1528, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Poltimore, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Bampfylde 1485 in Poltimore, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bamfield 26 und seine Mutter Margaret St Maur 16. Er hat 1515 in Poltimore, Devon, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Wadham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Mai 1528 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Poltimore, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Bampfylde è nato il nel 1485 nel Poltimore, Devon, England, il suo padre, William Bamfield, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret St Maur, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wadham nel 1515, nel Poltimore, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì il 20 maggio 1528, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Poltimore, Devon, England.

ja.of, Poltimore, Devonshire, England: イギリスイギリスデボンポルティモー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Bampfyldeが1485年にイギリスデボンポルティモーで生まれた時，父William Bamfieldは26歳，母Margaret St Maurは16歳であった。1515年にイギリスイギリスデボンポルティモーでElizabeth Wadhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1528年5月20日に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスデボンポルティモーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Bampfylde(이)가 1485년 영국 데폰 포팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bamfield(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret St Maur(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 포팀어에서 Elizabeth Wadham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1528년 5월 20일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 포팀어에 묻혔다.

mn.of, Poltimore, Devonshire, England: Poltimore, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Bampfylde nasceu em 1485, em Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Bamfield, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret St Maur, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wadham em 1515, em Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de maio de 1528, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Bampfylde родился в 1485 г. в местности полтимор, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Bamfield было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret St Maur, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wadham в 1515 г. в местности полтимор, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер 20 мая 1528 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности полтимор, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Bampfylde nació en 1485, en Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William Bamfield, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret St Maur, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Wadham en 1515, en Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1528, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra.
